title: EMERGENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY BASIC CENTER BEND EMERGENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis hotline, short and long term shelter, case management and advocacy, crisis intervention, short term counseling, and mediation services between youth and their families. 2125 NE Daggett Lane Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Runaway and at-risk youth ages 11-17 Hours: Shelter and Crisis Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Other service times may vary. Email (541) 382-0934 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 382-0934 Crisis Hotline (800) 660-0934 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * Homeless Youth Mediation * Homelessness Issues Runaway/Homeless Youth Counseling Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines Youth Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY BASIC CENTER BEND
